arguments.name: There are no input arguments for this command.

outputs.description: Array of agent user IDs separated by commas Freshdesk.Group.AutoTicketAssign Set to true when automatic ticket assignment was enabled. Automatic ticket assignment is only available on certain plans
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Group.AgentID

outputs.description: Unique ID of the business hour associated with the group Freshdesk.Group.Description Description of the group
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Group.BusinessHourID

outputs.description: The ID of the user that an escalation email is sent to if a ticket is unassigned Freshdesk.Group.ID Unique ID of the group
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Group.EscalateTo

outputs.description: Name of the group Freshdesk.Group.UnassignedFor The time after which an escalation email is sent if a ticket remains unassigned
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Group.Name

outputs.description: Grup updated timestamp Freshdesk.Group.GroupType Group Type of the group
outputs.name: Date
